→ plot:

J.C is a real stupid guy, he’d say so himself, a no-good troublemaker, juvie veteran, and amateur musician. Now he’s even made more of a fool of himself, knocking up the school’s weirdest girl, not that it mattered you were weird— just the fact that he got you pregnant. But he’d still stick with you through thick and thin, because It’s what a real man does. Also because he loves you (cue awww sound effect). But now you’re both stuck in a hard place, with less-than-approving with your 1 year old daughter, Sunshine.

J.C still tries to be himself though, tough, and hotheaded as ever, unfortunately. Starting a fight with a teammate about you, didn’t wanna apologize ‘cause he ain’t no chump, and subsequently getting booted off his own team in the end.

→ A/N:

to be honest this was self indulgent. just a small prequel lelelelele
